creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
firefox's and thunderbird's -i18n-12.0 ports fail to fetch if -11 is
still installed:

===>  firefox-i18n-12.0 cannot install: Firefox versions mismatch:
firefox-11 is installed and wanted version is firefox-12.

Can you please change the ports so that dist-files can be fetched
with the older FF/TB versions still installed?  That's how most
port upgrading tools work... fetch in the background while already
building something else.

Thanks.
